metadata.title: WritingDeveloper
metadata.description: Dev stories, deep-dive build logs, and hands-on tutorials from Si Hyeong Lee — a full-stack developer shipping web, AI, and indie projects.

hero.name: Si Hyeong Lee
hero.description: I solve problems with code and share my experiences through writing.

home.metaDescription: Si Hyeong Lee — full-stack developer and indie maker. I ship web, mobile, desktop, AI, and game projects, and write about how each one was built.

blog.title: Blog
blog.description: Stories about development, technology, and startups
blog.metaDescription: In-depth build logs and dev stories from Si Hyeong Lee — AI safety, full-stack architecture, indie hacking, and lessons from shipping real products.
blog.newsletterDescription: Get notified when new posts are published.
blog.newsletterComingSoon: Newsletter feature is coming soon. Stay tuned!

projects.title: Projects
projects.metaDescription: Around 30 projects by Si Hyeong Lee across web, mobile, desktop, AI, and games — SaaS apps, developer tools, data visualizations, and experimental builds, with live demos.

graveyard.title: Project Graveyard
graveyard.description: Here lie the projects I built and lost — an honest record of what failure taught me.
graveyard.metaDescription: A memorial to projects Si Hyeong Lee built and then failed or discontinued. Each tombstone carries its cause of death, an honest post-mortem, and the lessons learned.

about.title: About
about.description: My journey as a developer and entrepreneur
about.metaDescription: Si Hyeong Lee — full-stack developer and entrepreneur. The story behind Soursea, HealFrame, and around 20 builds, with the tech stack and timeline behind them.
about.body: As a developer and entrepreneur, I solve problems with technology. I build projects like Soursea and Don't Touch — each born from a real problem I faced — and share what I learn through this blog.

play.title: Explore
play.metaDescription: Explore Si Hyeong Lee's portfolio in an interactive 3D space — navigate projects, skills, timeline, and writing rendered in real-time WebGL.
